_notice: Equipment catalog data. See LICENSE in repository.

manufacturers.history: Founded as Minnesota Valley Engineering. Acquired by Chart Industries; spun out to Cryoport in 2023.
Formed 2024 by merger of Worthington Industries' life sciences cryogenic line and International Cryogenics, Inc. Continues to manufacture certain products under the Taylor-Wharton brand.
Specimen storage product line. Now manufactured and supported by IC Biomedical. The Taylor-Wharton industrial gas business is a separate company unrelated to specimen storage.
Industrial division remains independent; the cryogenic specimen storage line was sold to IC Biomedical in 2024.
Was Panasonic Healthcare; rebranded PHCbi. Earlier products carry the Sanyo brand; same supply chain.
Forma Scientific was acquired by Thermo. Forma-branded equipment in service is supported under Thermo today.
UK manufacturer of controlled-rate freezers. Independent.

IVF / ART-focused manufacturer of LN2 dewars (Standard 47L, VitroStash 47L, VitroStash MAX) plus the proprietary VitroStash stacked-canister system. A "Forge" affiliation appears in their contact email (sales@forge-coldstash.com) but corporate ownership is not publicly disclosed.

Manufactures cryostorage racking systems, canisters (HC-50, D-800, D-630, D-580, D-508), and inventory-management software. Products are accessories that fit other manufacturers' vessels — Cryohexagon does not produce dewars or freezers. v0.1 equipment_specs has no category for accessories; recording Cryohexagon equipment is deferred to v0.2.

Branded "phasetwo®" (lowercase) on company materials. Full product line: Cryogenic Canister Freezers (CCF35V, CCF35H, CCF90), Cryogenic Rack Freezers, High-Capacity High-Efficiency freezers (HCHE Series, 20K-107K vials with automated control), vapor shippers, and long-term freezers. Operating range -150°C to -196°C.

categories.label: Static dewar (small)
categories.description: Hand-portable LN2 dewar, 3 to 50 L capacity, characterized by static hold time.

categories.label: Static dewar (large)
categories.description: Larger LN2 dewar, 50+ L capacity, still static-fill, hold time central.

categories.label: Vapor shipper
categories.description: Dry-shipper for transport; sample stored in vapor phase, hold time measured in vapor mode.

categories.label: Dual-mode dewar
categories.description: Convertible static-fill or vapor-shipping dewar, characterized by both modes.

categories.label: Isothermal LN2 freezer
categories.description: Production-scale LN2 freezer with auto-fill controller; characterized by capacity, controller, and refill behavior rather than static hold time.

categories.label: Controlled-rate freezer
categories.description: Controlled-rate freezer for programmed cooling protocols; characterized by cooling rate range and protocol storage.

categories.label: Mechanical ULT freezer
categories.description: Electric ultra-low-temperature freezer (-70 to -86°C); characterized by temperature range, capacity, and recovery time.

HC Series High-Capacity Small Freezer. Lockable lid. Numbered index ring and tapered internal canister locator. Working time (liquid) 75 days.
HC Series High-Capacity Small Freezer. VHC (Very High Capacity) variant with 6 large-diameter canisters. Lockable lid. Numbered index ring and tapered internal canister locator.
LN2 liquid dewar for safe storage and dispensing of small amounts of liquid nitrogen. Rugged ribbed high-strength aluminum body, magneformed necktube design.

LN2 liquid dewar for safe storage and dispensing of small amounts of liquid nitrogen. Wide necktube (142.2 mm) design. Hold time × evap rate check: 6 × 0.77 = 4.62 L vs 5 L capacity — within ~8%, consistent.
LN2 liquid dewar for safe storage and dispensing of small amounts of liquid nitrogen.
LN2 liquid dewar compatible with Liquid Withdrawal Device (LWD) for pressure transfers up to 8 L/min at 7.25 psig.

Classic variant of the 25L LD series. Slightly lower evaporation rate and longer hold time than 25LD. Narrower neck (50.8 mm vs 63.5 mm). Does not appear to be compatible with the Liquid Withdrawal Device based on spec sheet context.
LN2 liquid dewar compatible with Liquid Withdrawal Device (LWD) for pressure transfers up to 8 L/min at 7.25 psig.
LN2 liquid dewar compatible with Liquid Withdrawal Device (LWD) for pressure transfers up to 8 L/min at 7.25 psig.

Vapor (dry) shipper. IATA compliant. Advanced Concept Adsorbent for faster charging. Lockable lid. Static hold time from spec sheet used as vapor_hold_time_days. Consistency check: 3.7 L / 0.2 L/day = 18.5 days ≈ 18 days stated. ✓

Vapor (dry) shipper. IATA compliant. Advanced Concept Adsorbent for faster charging. Lockable lid. Static hold time from spec sheet used as vapor_hold_time_days. Consistency check: 3.7 L / 0.23 L/day = 16.1 days ≈ 16 days stated. ✓

Vapor (dry) shipper. IATA compliant. Advanced Concept Adsorbent for faster charging. Lockable lid. Number of Canisters listed as N/A. Static hold time from spec sheet used as vapor_hold_time_days. Consistency check: 6.4 L / 0.64 L/day = 10 days vs 11 days stated — within ±30% tolerance. ✓

equipment.notes: Vapor (dry) shipper. Wider necktube variant of 4D. Hydrophobic adsorbent material. Complies with IATA regulations for open cryogenic receptacles. Lockable lid. Static hold time and evap rate are nominal. Weights are for guidance only.

Vapor (dry) shipper. Large-capacity model with wide 8.5in necktube. Hydrophobic adsorbent material. Complies with IATA regulations for open cryogenic receptacles. Lockable lid. Canister count not specified; blood bag capacity is 10 bags. 0.25cc straw, 0.5cc straw, and 5/cane vial configurations are N/A for this model.
Dual-mode: usable as LN2 static storage or vapor shipper. 'Charged' weight interpreted as vapor-charged weight for shipping mode.
Dual-mode: usable as LN2 static storage or vapor shipper. 'Charged' weight interpreted as vapor-charged weight for shipping mode.

Dual-mode: usable as LN2 static storage or vapor shipper. 'Charged' weight interpreted as vapor-charged weight for shipping mode. Consistency check: 48L / 0.390 L/day ≈ 123 days; stated hold time is 76 days — possible discrepancy; may reflect working volume or safety reserve basis.

Dual-mode: usable as LN2 static storage or vapor shipper. 'Charged' weight interpreted as vapor-charged weight for shipping mode. Same LN2 capacity and evap rate as TW47-6 Dual but 10 smaller-diameter canisters vs 6 larger. Consistency check: 48L / 0.390 L/day ≈ 123 days; stated hold time is 76 days — possible discrepancy; may reflect working volume or safety reserve basis.

Liquid Dewar 25 liters. Designed for LN2 storage and transfer to cryo gun canisters used in cryosurgical procedures. Compatible with LWD (D050-8C03) and Roller Base (R018-8C00). No evaporation rate or hold time data published in this document.

Liquid Dewar 35 liters. Designed for LN2 storage and transfer to cryo gun canisters used in cryosurgical procedures. Compatible with LWD (D050-8C03) and Roller Base (R033-8C00). No evaporation rate or hold time data published in this document.

Liquid Dewar 50 liters. Designed for LN2 storage and transfer to cryo gun canisters used in cryosurgical procedures. Compatible with LWD (D050-8C03) and Roller Base (R033-8C00). No evaporation rate or hold time data published in this document.

6 racks, 5 shelves/rack. Vapor-phase storage temperature at top of racks is -190°C. High strength aluminum body, magneformed necktube. Lockable lid. Hold time check: 35 L / 0.27 L/day ≈ 130 days — consistent.

Vapor-phase storage temperature at top of racks is -190°C. High strength aluminum body, magneformed necktube. Lockable lid. Hold time check: 81 L / 0.76 L/day ≈ 107 days — consistent with stated 106 days.

Vapor-phase storage temperature at top of racks is -190°C. High strength aluminum body, magneformed necktube. Lockable lid. Low-level alarm and CS100 controller available with remote connection capability. Hold time check: 130 L / 1.00 L/day = 130 days — consistent.

Vapor-phase storage temperature at top of racks is -190°C. High strength aluminum body, magneformed necktube. Lockable lid. Low-level alarm and CS100 controller available with remote connection capability. Hold time check: 165 L / 1.00 L/day = 165 days — consistent.

equipment.notes: Two-tier tray design for fertility market. Vapor phase storage at -190°C. LN2 capacity at platform vapor est. 56 L; LN2 capacity w/o inventory est. 381 L. Inner dimensions: 728 mm top tier, 702 mm bottom tier. Outer dimensions: 843 mm w/ handles. 115 SUC-1 canisters (2.5"x2.5"x11"). Usable internal height 330 mm per level. Category hint suggested dewar_vapor_shipper and freezer_mechanical_ult, but product is an isothermal LN2 freezer with vapor-phase storage and auto-fill (TEC 3000).
